name: Pop Culture
description: Movies, TV, music, and cultural moments

questions.q: Apple unveiled the first iPhone in which year, reshaping the mobile industry?

source.notes: Announced by Steve Jobs January 9, 2007. Sales began June 29, 2007.

questions.q: In what fictional Indiana town is the Netflix series 'Stranger Things' set?

source.notes: Created by the Duffer Brothers. Premiered 2016.

questions.q: The 1993 film 'Cool Runnings' is based on the real story of which country's first Olympic bobsled team?

source.notes: Based on the 1988 Calgary Winter Olympics. Starred John Candy.

questions.q: Which 1975 film based on a Ken Kesey novel won all five major Academy Awards (Best Picture, Director, Actor, Actress, Screenplay)?
choices: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest

source.notes: Directed by Miloš Forman. Starred Jack Nicholson. Only 3 films have won the 'Big Five' Oscars.

questions.q: Who played Don Vito Corleone in Francis Ford Coppola's 1972 film 'The Godfather'?

source.notes: Won Best Actor Oscar (declined the award). Robert De Niro played young Vito in Part II.

questions.q: In 'The Big Lebowski,' what sport does 'The Dude' (Jeff Bridges) and his friends play?

source.notes: Directed by the Coen Brothers, 1998. Cult classic.

questions.q: In the 'Austin Powers' films, what is the name of the bald villain famous for demanding 'one million dollars'?

source.notes: Played by Mike Myers, who also played Austin Powers and Goldmember.

questions.q: In 'Gladiator' (2000), Russell Crowe's character shouts 'Are you not entertained?' in what ancient venue?

source.notes: Directed by Ridley Scott. Won 5 Oscars including Best Picture.

questions.q: Kanye West's 2004 debut studio album was titled what?

source.notes: Released February 10, 2004. Featured 'Jesus Walks,' 'Through the Wire.'

questions.q: In which city does Kevin get lost in 'Home Alone 2' (1992)?

source.notes: Full title: 'Home Alone 2: Lost in New York.' Features the Plaza Hotel.

questions.q: Which NBA superstar teamed up with Bugs Bunny and the Looney Tunes in the 1996 film 'Space Jam'?

source.notes: Sequel 'Space Jam: A New Legacy' starred LeBron James in 2021.

questions.q: From which U.S. state does Forrest Gump hail in the 1994 film?

source.notes: Greenbow, Alabama. Won 6 Oscars including Best Picture.

questions.q: Optimus Prime is the heroic leader of the Autobots in which sci-fi franchise?

source.notes: Originated in 1984 Hasbro toy line. Michael Bay's first live-action film 2007.

questions.q: 'Casino Royale' (2006) introduced which actor as the sixth James Bond?

source.notes: Craig played Bond 5 times (2006-2021). Final Bond film: 'No Time to Die.'

questions.q: In the Disney film 'High School Musical,' what is the name of Zac Efron's character?

source.notes: Captain of the East High Wildcats basketball team.

questions.q: Michelle Yeoh won the 2023 Best Actress Oscar for her role in which film?

source.notes: Film won 7 Academy Awards including Best Picture. Directed by the Daniels.

questions.q: In which animated Disney film does a young lion named Simba reclaim his father's kingdom?

source.notes: Released 1994. Songs by Elton John and Tim Rice. Hamlet-inspired plot.

questions.q: Which film franchise features Dom Toretto, street racing, and increasingly improbable car stunts?

source.notes: First film released 2001. Starring Vin Diesel and Paul Walker.

questions.q: Which animated musical film features the song 'A Whole New World' sung from a flying carpet?

source.notes: 1992 Disney film. Voice cast includes Robin Williams as the Genie.

questions.q: Which reality show catchphrase is associated with host Heidi Klum?

source.notes: 'Project Runway.' Sometimes just 'Auf Wiedersehen.' Tim Gunn said 'Make it work.'
